<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="iJI42odrvlAE_QTKBOVh"> <mxGraphModel dx="1245" dy="823" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="rARO2HxIOyNkZRo8KeCk-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=#666666;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="670" width="1200" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="publisher1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;verticalAlign=middle;spacingTop=2;spacingBottom=2;shadow=1;arcSize=12;" value="Publisher 1
(RevPi PLC)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="40" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="broker" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;fontSize=15;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;shadow=1;arcSize=8;container=0;" value="EMQX Broker" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="280" x="440" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="routingEngine" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=middle;shadow=0;arcSize=10;fontColor=#333333;" value="Topic Routing Engine" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="480" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subscriber1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;verticalAlign=middle;spacingTop=2;spacingBottom=2;shadow=1;arcSize=12;" value="Subscriber 1
(ML Service)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="940" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subscriber2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;verticalAlign=middle;spacingTop=2;spacingBottom=2;shadow=1;arcSize=12;" value="Subscriber 2
(FastAPI Backend)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="940" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subscriber3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;verticalAlign=middle;spacingTop=2;spacingBottom=2;shadow=1;arcSize=12;" value="Subscriber 3
(Monitoring Dashboard)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="940" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_pub_broker" edge="1" parent="1" source="publisher1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=1;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#b85450;endArrow=blockThin;endFill=1;shadow=1;" target="broker" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_pub_broker_label" connectable="0" parent="arrow_pub_broker" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=11;fontColor=#b85450;labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" value="<b>publish</b>
<font style="font-size:10px;">factory/line1/runtime/cycle/features</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.1" y="-20" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="10" y="-25" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_broker_sub1" edge="1" parent="1" source="broker" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=1;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;endArrow=blockThin;endFill=1;shadow=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.25;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="subscriber1" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_broker_sub1_label" connectable="0" parent="arrow_broker_sub1" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=11;fontColor=#6c8ebf;labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" value="<b>deliver</b>
<font style="font-size:10px;">matching topics</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.1" y="-15" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="-80" y="-25" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_broker_sub2" edge="1" parent="1" source="broker" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=1;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;endArrow=blockThin;endFill=1;shadow=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="subscriber2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_broker_sub2_label" connectable="0" parent="arrow_broker_sub2" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=11;fontColor=#6c8ebf;labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" value="<b>deliver</b>

are fully decoupled.
QoS 0, 1, or 2
per message link.
